title: spartina stricta subsp. townsendii
intro: Spartina stricta subsp. townsendii, also known as big cordgrass, is a type of perennial grass native to coastal areas of North America. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Spartina stricta subsp. townsendii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Traditional herbal preparations involve using the plant's roots or leaves in infusions, decoctions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
